Test Case Description: Verify cart page loads successfully
Expected Result: Cart page loads without error, blank page, or broken layout

Test Case Description: Verify empty cart state
Expected Result: Empty cart message and continue shopping CTA are displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify cart with product loads successfully
Preconditions: Cart has at least one product
Expected Result: Cart displays product details correctly

Test Case Description: Verify region-specific content is displayed correctly
Expected Result: Currency, delivery message, and payment messaging are correct for selected region

Test Case Description: Verify cart page loads over HTTPS
Expected Result: Page loads securely without browser warning

Test Case Description: Verify cart count matches cart quantity
Steps: 1. Observe header cart count 2. Compare with cart quantity
Expected Result: Header cart count matches cart item quantity

Test Case Description: Verify product image is displayed
Expected Result: Product image is visible and not broken

Test Case Description: Verify product name is displayed
Expected Result: Product name is visible and correct

Test Case Description: Verify product attributes are displayed
Expected Result: Selected size, colour, or variant details are displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify product price is displayed
Expected Result: Product price is visible and formatted correctly

Test Case Description: Verify sale price is displayed correctly
Expected Result: Sale price/original price are displayed correctly where applicable

Test Case Description: Verify product link redirects to PDP
Expected Result: Correct PDP opens

Test Case Description: Verify quantity selector/input is displayed
Expected Result: Quantity control is visible

Test Case Description: Verify increasing quantity updates cart
Preconditions: Cart has product with available stock
Expected Result: Item quantity and cart totals update correctly

Test Case Description: Verify decreasing quantity updates cart
Expected Result: Item quantity and cart totals update correctly

Test Case Description: Verify quantity cannot be set below minimum
Steps: 1. Attempt to set quantity to 0 or negative value
Expected Result: Quantity is rejected or product removal flow is triggered as designed

Test Case Description: Verify quantity cannot exceed available stock
Expected Result: Validation message is displayed and quantity is not incorrectly updated

Test Case Description: Verify manual quantity input works if supported
Expected Result: Cart quantity and totals update correctly

Test Case Description: Verify invalid quantity input is handled
Steps: 1. Enter invalid value such as text/symbol
Expected Result: Validation message is shown and cart remains stable

Test Case Description: Verify product can be removed from cart
Expected Result: Product is removed and totals update correctly

Test Case Description: Verify cart shows empty state after removing last item
Expected Result: Empty cart state is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify removing one item does not remove other items
Expected Result: Only selected product is removed

Test Case Description: Verify subtotal is displayed
Expected Result: Subtotal is visible and calculated correctly

Test Case Description: Verify discount is displayed correctly if applied
Expected Result: Discount appears correctly in order summary

Test Case Description: Verify shipping estimate is displayed if applicable
Expected Result: Shipping estimate/message is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify tax/GST is displayed correctly if applicable
Expected Result: Tax/GST value and label are correct

Test Case Description: Verify grand total is calculated correctly
Expected Result: Grand total equals subtotal + fees - discounts as designed

Test Case Description: Verify totals update after quantity change
Expected Result: Subtotal, discount, shipping, tax, and grand total update correctly

Test Case Description: Verify totals update after item removal
Expected Result: Cart totals update correctly

Test Case Description: Verify coupon field is displayed
Expected Result: Coupon/promo code field is visible

Test Case Description: Verify valid coupon can be applied
Expected Result: Coupon is applied and discount is reflected in totals

Test Case Description: Verify invalid coupon shows validation message
Expected Result: Proper error message is displayed

Test Case Description: Verify applied coupon can be removed
Expected Result: Coupon is removed and totals update correctly

Test Case Description: Verify coupon persists after cart refresh
Expected Result: Coupon remains applied as designed

Test Case Description: Verify coupon does not apply to excluded products
Expected Result: Coupon is rejected or discount is not applied incorrectly

Test Case Description: Verify available payment method messaging is displayed
Expected Result: Payment method messages are displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify payment promo rules are correct
Steps: 1. Set cart total within/outside promo range
Expected Result: Promo message appears or hides according to rules

Test Case Description: Verify payment promo modal/link opens correctly
Expected Result: Correct modal/page opens

Test Case Description: Verify checkout button is displayed
Expected Result: Checkout CTA is visible and enabled

Test Case Description: Verify clicking checkout redirects to checkout page
Expected Result: User is redirected to checkout page

Test Case Description: Verify checkout is blocked when cart has unavailable item
Expected Result: User cannot proceed and proper message is shown

Test Case Description: Verify continue shopping link is displayed
Expected Result: Continue shopping CTA is visible

Test Case Description: Verify continue shopping redirects correctly
Expected Result: User is redirected to homepage/PLP as designed

Test Case Description: Verify mini-cart reflects cart changes
Expected Result: Mini-cart quantity and product details match cart

Test Case Description: Verify cart page reflects mini-cart changes
Steps: 1. Update/remove product in mini-cart 2. Open cart
Expected Result: Cart page reflects changes correctly

Test Case Description: Verify stock validation after cart update
Expected Result: Proper stock validation is displayed

Test Case Description: Verify cart handles product becoming unavailable
Preconditions: Product becomes unavailable after added to cart
Expected Result: User is informed and checkout is restricted as designed

Test Case Description: Verify cart handles price change after product added
Preconditions: Product price changes after added to cart
Expected Result: Updated price is reflected or user is informed as designed

Test Case Description: Verify guest cart persists after page refresh
Preconditions: Guest user has product in cart
Expected Result: Cart items remain available

Test Case Description: Verify guest cart persists after browser back/forward navigation
Preconditions: Guest user has product in cart
Expected Result: Cart remains consistent

Test Case Description: Verify logged-in user cart loads correctly
Preconditions: User is logged in with cart items
Expected Result: User’s cart items are displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify guest cart merges after login if applicable
Preconditions: Guest cart has product; User logs in
Expected Result: Guest cart merges with account cart according to design

Test Case Description: Verify cart is consistent across sessions if applicable
Steps: 1. Log out/in or open new session
Expected Result: Cart items persist according to account behavior

Test Case Description: Verify cart layout is displayed correctly
Expected Result: Cart item list and order summary are aligned correctly

Test Case Description: Verify no overlapping UI elements on cart page
Expected Result: No overlap between header, item list, order summary, chat widget, sticky CTA, and footer

Test Case Description: Verify cart text is readable
Steps: 1. Inspect labels, product names, prices, messages
Expected Result: No text is truncated, hidden, or unreadable

Test Case Description: Verify sticky order summary/checkout CTA behavior if applicable
Expected Result: Sticky summary/CTA behaves correctly

Test Case Description: Verify cart layout on desktop viewport
Expected Result: Desktop cart layout is correct

Test Case Description: Verify cart layout on tablet viewport
Expected Result: Tablet cart layout adapts correctly

Test Case Description: Verify cart layout on mobile viewport
Expected Result: Mobile cart layout adapts correctly without horizontal overflow

Test Case Description: Verify quantity update works on mobile
Expected Result: Quantity and totals update correctly

Test Case Description: Verify remove item works on mobile
Expected Result: Product is removed and totals update correctly

Test Case Description: Verify checkout CTA is accessible on mobile
Expected Result: Checkout CTA remains accessible and usable

Test Case Description: Verify cart page load performance is acceptable
Expected Result: Cart loads within acceptable threshold

Test Case Description: Verify cart update performance is acceptable
Expected Result: Cart updates within acceptable threshold

Test Case Description: Verify repeated cart updates do not break cart
Steps: 1. Update quantity repeatedly 2. Remove/apply coupon repeatedly
Expected Result: Cart remains stable without broken state

Test Case Description: Verify cart handles failed cart update gracefully
Expected Result: User-friendly error is shown and cart remains stable

Test Case Description: Verify cart handles failed coupon apply gracefully
Expected Result: User-friendly error is shown and totals are not corrupted

Test Case Description: Verify cart handles failed checkout redirect gracefully
Expected Result: User-friendly error is shown or user remains on cart safely

Test Case Description: Verify keyboard navigation on cart page
Expected Result: Focus order is logical and controls are reachable

Test Case Description: Verify cart controls have accessible labels
Steps: 1. Inspect quantity, remove, coupon, checkout controls
Expected Result: Controls have meaningful accessible labels

Test Case Description: Verify cart view tracking is fired
Expected Result: Expected cart view event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify quantity update tracking is fired
Expected Result: Expected cart update event is triggered

Test Case Description: Verify remove-from-cart tracking is fired
Expected Result: Expected remove-from-cart event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify coupon apply tracking is fired
Expected Result: Expected coupon event is triggered with correct metadata

Test Case Description: Verify checkout click tracking is fired
Expected Result: Expected checkout-start or checkout-click event is triggered

Test Case Description: Verify cart analytics metadata is correct
Steps: 1. Trigger cart interactions 2. Inspect event payload
Expected Result: Event metadata such as product ID, variant, quantity, price, discount, cart total, region, and currency are correct
